# `/permission` Command
Reloads and applies permissions.

<table>
  <tr>
    <th>Aliases</th>
    <td>/ops</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Permission Level</th>
    <td>Owner</td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <th>Requires Cheats?</th>
    <td>Yes</td>
  </tr>
</table>

## Usage
### `/permission <action: PermissionsAction>`

## Arguments
- `action`: PermissionsAction

## Enums
### `PermissionsAction`

#### Values
- `list`
- `reload`
